result.title: Design a Traffic Signal Control System
Design a Digital Wallet / Payment System

summary: Generate 6 new-prompt LLD sessions (Order Matching Engine, ATM, Traffic Signal, Digital Wallet, Search Autocomplete, LFU Cache): build+test code and full §1–§9 markdown, adversarially verify, then fix. Orchestrator assembles JSON afterwards.
